message:
feat(mcp): add URI-template resources and refactor resource helpers

Expand the MCP server's resource surface with parameterized URI
templates so agents can request filtered/paginated data without
constructing tool calls, and refactor shared resource-reading logic
into reusable helpers to eliminate duplication.

MCP resource templates (crates/wa-core/src/mcp.rs):
- WaEventsTemplateResource: wa://events/template with {limit} param
  for page-sized event queries
- WaEventsUnhandledTemplateResource: wa://events/unhandled/template
  with {limit} param for unhandled-only event filtering
- WaAccountsByServiceTemplateResource: wa://accounts/{service} for
  per-service account lookup
- WaRulesByAgentTemplateResource: wa://rules/{agent_type} for
  agent-type-filtered rule listing
- WaReservationsByPaneTemplateResource: wa://reservations/{pane_id}
  for per-pane reservation queries

Refactored helpers:
- read_events_resource: shared event reading with limit + unhandled
  params, clamped to [1, 1000]
- read_accounts_resource: shared account reading with service filter
- read_rules_resource: shared rules reading with optional agent_type
- read_reservations_resource: shared reservations with optional pane_id
- tool_output_as_resource: converts tool CallToolResult into
  ResourceContent (extracted from existing inline code)

Formatting cleanup (rustfmt):
- export.rs, extensions.rs, recording.rs, replay.rs, reports.rs,
  simulation.rs, tui/app.rs, tui/views.rs, wezterm.rs: apply rustfmt
  2024 formatting for multi-line function args, match arms, closure
  formatting, and import ordering consistency

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
